page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c14d3.14xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 56 dedicated physical cores utilizing the Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is configured with 160.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 2.86 GB of RAM per core.

A defining characteristic of this instance is its massive local storage capacity, consisting of 70,866 GB of local HDD storage. This high-capacity storage configuration is paired with a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps, enabling high-throughput data transfers. There are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this instance.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers high resource density specifically for storage-heavy workloads, trading off the speed of solid-state drives for massive, cost-effective HDD capacity. This hardware profile is suited for large-scale data warehousing, log processing, big data analytics, and distributed file systems where massive sequential storage capacity is prioritized over high random IOPS.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.d1ne-c14d3.14xlarge is a storage-focused x86_64 server instance powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It features 56 dedicated physical cores, 160.0 GB of RAM, and a baseline network bandwidth of 35 Gbps. The defining feature of this KVM-based instance is its massive 70,866 GB of local HDD storage, making it highly cost-efficient for workloads requiring vast storage capacity. Lacking a GPU, this instance is designed for data-intensive applications rather than acceleration. It is suited for big data analytics, large-scale log processing, distributed file systems, and data warehousing where sequential storage volume is prioritized over solid-state speed.

tagline: A high-capacity storage instance featuring fifty-six dedicated cores and over seventy terabytes of local HDD storage for massive data workloads.
